channel.title: git submodule on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in git submodule on My Hugo

item.title: Git Submodule
item.description: Prepare Root Repo and Clone It See details at Push Excercise Add submodule Delete and clone repo dave from adam $ cd $REPO $ rm -rf dave $ git clone adam dave --bare Remove dave from susan $ cd $EX/susan $ git remote remove origin Add susan as submodule of dave $ cd $EX $ git clone $REPO/dave $ cd dave $ git submodule add $EX/susan susan $ git status On branch master Your branch is up-to-date with 'origin/master'.
